headline: Accenture Plc (ACN): A Debt-Free IT Stock Expanding AI Capabilities Despite Downgrade
summary: Accenture Plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the best debt-free IT stocks to buy now. On June 1, Truist Securities downgraded Accenture Plc (NYSE:ACN) to a Hold with a $210 price target. The downgrade came amid concerns the company could struggle amid constrained budgets in the sector. In addition, Truist Securities remains wary of competition from […]
